tool_input.description: List files in latest training run

tool_input.command:
python - <<'PY'
from pathlib import Path
import re
import shutil
from torch.utils.tensorboard import SummaryWriter

runs_root = Path('rllm_train/output/runs')
tb_root = Path('rllm_train/output/tensorboard_from_logs')
if tb_root.exists():
    shutil.rmtree(tb_root)
tb_root.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)

trl_pattern = re.compile(r'\[TRL_STEP\]\s+reward=(?P<reward>[-+0-9.eE]+)\s+loss=(?P<loss>[-+0-9.eE]+)\s+entropy=(?P<entropy>[-+0-9.eE]+)\s+grad_norm=(?P<grad_norm>[-+0-9.eE]+)\s+clipped_ratio=(?P<clipped_ratio>[-+0-9.eE]+)\s+epoch=(?P<epoch>[-+0-9.eE]+)\s+step_time=(?P<step_time>[-+0-9.eE]+)s')
monitor_pattern = re.compile(r'\[MONITOR_STEP\]\s+Step\s+(?P<step>\d+)/\?\s+\|\s+R\s+(?P<reward>[-+0-9.eE]+)\s+\|\s+Rstd\s+(?P<reward_std>[-+0-9.eE]+)\s+\|\s+Loss\s+(?P<loss>[-+0-9.eE]+)\s+\|\s+Grad\s+(?P<grad_norm>[-+0-9.eE]+)\s+\|\s+Ent\s+(?P<entropy>[-+0-9.eE]+)\s+\|\s+Clip\s+(?P<clip>[-+0-9.eE]+)\s+\|\s+Len\s+(?P<len>[-+0-9.eE]+)\s+\|\s+Finish\s+(?P<finish>[-+0-9.eE]+)%\s+\|\s+FmtOK\s+(?P<fmt_ok>[-+0-9.eE]+)%\s+\|\s+Tool\s+(?P<tool>[-+0-9.eE]+)%\s+\|\s+Ans\s+(?P<ans>[-+0-9.eE]+)%\s+\|\s+tok/s\s+(?P<tok_s>[-+0-9.eE]+)\s+\|\s+Time\s+(?P<time>[-+0-9.eE]+)s')

def add_scalars(writer, prefix, step, values):
    for key, value in values.items():
        if key == 'step':
            continue
        writer.add_scalar(f'{prefix}/{key}', float(value), step)

written_runs = 0
written_points = 0
for run_dir in sorted(runs_root.glob('run_*')):
    log_path = run_dir / 'training_log.txt'
    if not log_path.exists():
        continue
    writer = SummaryWriter(log_dir=str(tb_root / run_dir.name))
    trl_step = 0
    monitor_seen = set()
    text = log_path.read_text(errors='ignore')
    for match in trl_pattern.finditer(text):
        trl_step += 1
        add_scalars(writer, 'trl', trl_step, match.groupdict())
        written_points += 1
    for match in monitor_pattern.finditer(text):
        data = match.groupdict()
        step = int(data['step'])
        monitor_seen.add(step)
        add_scalars(writer, 'monitor', step, data)
        written_points += 1
    writer.flush()
    writer.close()
    if trl_step or monitor_seen:
        written_runs += 1
    else:
        shutil.rmtree(tb_root / run_dir.name, ignore_errors=True)

print(f'Wrote TensorBoard logs to {tb_root}')
print(f'Runs with scalar data: {written_runs}')
print(f'Scalar points written: {written_points}')
PY

python - <<'PY'
from pathlib import Path
import re
import shutil
from torch.utils.tensorboard import SummaryWriter

runs_root = Path('rllm_train/output/runs')
tb_root = Path('rllm_train/output/tensorboard_from_logs')
tmp_root = Path('rllm_train/output/tensorboard_from_logs.tmp')
if tmp_root.exists():
    shutil.rmtree(tmp_root)
tmp_root.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)

trl_pattern = re.compile(r'\[TRL_STEP\]\s+reward=(?P<reward>[-+0-9.eE]+)\s+loss=(?P<loss>[-+0-9.eE]+)\s+entropy=(?P<entropy>[-+0-9.eE]+)\s+grad_norm=(?P<grad_norm>[-+0-9.eE]+)\s+clipped_ratio=(?P<clipped_ratio>[-+0-9.eE]+)\s+epoch=(?P<epoch>[-+0-9.eE]+)\s+step_time=(?P<step_time>[-+0-9.eE]+)s')
monitor_pattern = re.compile(r'\[MONITOR_STEP\]\s+Step\s+(?P<step>\d+)/\?\s+\|\s+R\s+(?P<reward>[-+0-9.eE]+)\s+\|\s+Rstd\s+(?P<reward_std>[-+0-9.eE]+)\s+\|\s+Loss\s+(?P<loss>[-+0-9.eE]+)\s+\|\s+Grad\s+(?P<grad_norm>[-+0-9.eE]+)\s+\|\s+Ent\s+(?P<entropy>[-+0-9.eE]+)\s+\|\s+Clip\s+(?P<clip>[-+0-9.eE]+)\s+\|\s+Len\s+(?P<len>[-+0-9.eE]+)\s+\|\s+Finish\s+(?P<finish>[-+0-9.eE]+)%\s+\|\s+FmtOK\s+(?P<fmt_ok>[-+0-9.eE]+)%\s+\|\s+Tool\s+(?P<tool>[-+0-9.eE]+)%\s+\|\s+Ans\s+(?P<ans>[-+0-9.eE]+)%\s+\|\s+tok/s\s+(?P<tok_s>[-+0-9.eE]+)\s+\|\s+Time\s+(?P<time>[-+0-9.eE]+)s')

def add_scalars(writer, prefix, step, values):
    for key, value in values.items():
        if key == 'step':
            continue
        writer.add_scalar(f'{prefix}/{key}', float(value), step)

written_runs = 0
written_points = 0
for run_dir in sorted(runs_root.glob('run_*')):
    log_path = run_dir / 'training_log.txt'
    if not log_path.exists():
        continue
    text = log_path.read_text(errors='ignore')
    trl_matches = list(trl_pattern.finditer(text))
    monitor_matches = list(monitor_pattern.finditer(text))
    if not trl_matches and not monitor_matches:
        continue
    writer = SummaryWriter(log_dir=str(tmp_root / run_dir.name))
    for step, match in enumerate(trl_matches, start=1):
        add_scalars(writer, 'trl', step, match.groupdict())
        written_points += 1
    for match in monitor_matches:
        data = match.groupdict()
        add_scalars(writer, 'monitor', int(data['step']), data)
        written_points += 1
    writer.flush()
    writer.close()
    written_runs += 1

if tb_root.exists():
    shutil.rmtree(tb_root)
tmp_root.rename(tb_root)
print(f'Updated TensorBoard logs: {tb_root}')
print(f'Runs with scalar data: {written_runs}')
print(f'Scalar points written: {written_points}')
PY
python - <<'PY'
import urllib.request
try:
    with urllib.request.urlopen('http://127.0.0.1:6006/', timeout=5) as resp:
        print(f'TensorBoard status: {resp.status}')
except Exception as e:
    print(f'TensorBoard not reachable: {e}')
PY

    shutil.rmtree(tmp_root)
tmp_root.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)

trl_pattern = re.compile(r'\[TRL_STEP\]\s+reward=(?P<reward>[-+0-9.eE]+)\s+loss=(?P<loss>[-+0-9.eE]+)\s+entropy=(?P<entropy>[-+0-9.eE]+)\s+grad_norm=(?P<grad_norm>[-+0-9.eE]+)\s+clipped_ratio=(?P<clipped_ratio>[-+0-9.eE]+)\s+epoch=(?P<epoch>[-+0-9.eE]+)\s+step_time=(?P<step_time>[-+0-9.eE]+)s')
monitor_pattern = re.compile(r'\[MONITOR_STEP\]\s+Step\s+(?P<step>\d+)/\?\s+\|\s+R\s+(?P<reward>[-+0-9.eE]+)\s+\|\s+Rstd\s+(?P<reward_std>[-+0-9.eE]+)\s+\|\s+Loss\s+(?P<loss>[-+0-9.eE]+)\s+\|\s+Grad\s+(?P<grad_norm>[-+0-9.eE]+)\s+\|\s+Ent\s+(?P<entropy>[-+0-9.eE]+)\s+\|\s+Clip\s+(?P<clip>[-+0-9.eE]+)\s+\|\s+Len\s+(?P<len>[-+0-9.eE]+)\s+\|\s+Finish\s+(?P<finish>[-+0-9.eE]+)%\s+\|\s+FmtOK\s+(?P<fmt_ok>[-+0-9.eE]+)%\s+\|\s+Tool\s+(?P<tool>[-+0-9.eE]+)%\s+\|\s+Ans\s+(?P<ans>[-+0-9.eE]+)%\s+\|\s+tok/s\s+(?P<tok_s>[-+0-9.eE]+)\s+\|\s+Time\s+(?P<time>[-+0-9.eE]+)s')

def add_scalars(writer, prefix, step, values):
    for key, value in values.items():
        if key == 'step':
            continue
        writer.add_scalar(f'{prefix}/{key}', float(value), step)

written_runs = 0
written_points = 0
for run_dir in sorted(runs_root.glob('run_*')):
    log_path = run_dir / 'training_log.txt'
    if not log_path.exists():
        continue
    text = log_path.read_text(errors='ignore')
    trl_matches = list(trl_pattern.finditer(text))
    monitor_matches = list(monitor_pattern.finditer(text))
    if not trl_matches and not monitor_matches:
        continue
    writer = SummaryWriter(log_dir=str(tmp_root / run_dir.name))
    for step, match in enumerate(trl_matches, start=1):
        add_scalars(writer, 'trl', step, match.groupdict())
        written_points += 1
    for match in monitor_matches:
        data = match.groupdict()
        add_scalars(writer, 'monitor', int(data['step']), data)
        written_points += 1
    writer.flush()
    writer.close()
    written_runs += 1

if tb_root.exists():
    shutil.rmtree(tb_root)
tmp_root.rename(tb_root)
print(f'Updated TensorBoard logs: {tb_root}')
print(f'Runs with scalar data: {written_runs}')
print(f'Scalar points written: {written_points}')
